title: flowerovlove – “American Wedding”
author: Margaret Farrell

The post flowerovlove – “American Wedding” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
I cannot deny the catchiness of the new flowerovlove single "American Wedding." It's sweet and cheeky, with lyrics like "I love you so don't die" and "Meet me in Vegas baby/ I wanna have your babies/ I wanna be First Lady." There's a flirtatious country twinge to it that reminds me a bit of Sabrina Carpenter and Kacey Musgraves. It's a smart pop song, one that laughs at its sweetness. flowerovlove might be dreaming up a big diamond ring, but it's all in her head. Still, a little bit of delusion makes life fun.

"American Wedding" was written with Russell Chell, Skyler Stonestreet, and Ryland Blackinton. It was produced by Chell and Blackinton. It's the follow-up single to February's "Casual Lady." The rising British-Ivorian pop musician is making her Coachella debut on April 12. Listen to "American Wedding" below.
